base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_beam_power — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1986 metroid. Power Beam — default starting projectile. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Power Beam — default starting projectile; small yellow pellet; short-range
